title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at More Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at More Retail
jsonLd.description:
More Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About More Retail:
More Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail!
